Sage Bot Item Code: SC8
Scepter 'Winter Magic'

Once in a while, the unit restores 20% (+bonus of spell power) health to a random ally and removes all debuffs from that unit. The scepter owner also reduces the cooldown time of the target's weapon, armor, and artifact abilities by 2 sec. All allies in a small radius around the primary target restore health equal to 60% of the health restored by the original target and remove 1 random debuffs.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
